title: aquilegia vulgaris var. arbascensis
intro: Aquilegia vulgaris var. arbascensis, also known as Granny's Bonnet or Rocket Columbine, is a variety of the common columbine plant that is native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Aquilegia vulgaris var. arbascensis include soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into infusions, tinctures, or salves, and are often used to treat a range of health issues, including menstrual cramps and skin irritations.
